ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT( $User.BypassValidationRules__c || $Permission.PRPLegal || $Profile.Name = "Carmignac - System Administrator" ), ISCHANGED(StartDate__c), Name = "Go live" )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You cannot modify the Start Date for the milestone "Go live". This field is linked to the Launch Date, which can only be updated by the Legal Team.
